content.full_text:
FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION
428 J Street • Suite 620 • Sacramento, CA 95814-2329
(916) 322-5660 • Fax (916) 322-0886

June 19, 2007

Rick Graham, Administrator
General Services
Tulare County Office of Education
2637 W. Burrel Ave.
P.O. Box 5091
Visalia, CA 93278-5091

Re: Our File No. W-07-094

Dear Mr. Graham:

This correspondence is a written confirmation that the Fair Political Practices Commission (the “Commission”) has withdrawn your May 18, 2007, request for written advice regarding appropriate filing officers under the provisions of the Political Reform Act¹.

The matter has been resolved within the context of the code reviewing process. Thus, you no longer need this advice.

Should you have any further questions, please contact the Commission at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Scott Hallabrin
General Counsel

John W. Wallace
Assistant General Counsel
Legal Division

¹ Government Code sections 81000 – 91014. Commission regulations appear at Title 2, sections 18109 – 18997, of the California Code of Regulations.
